plugins.name: beepboop
plugins.description: Plays sounds on Claude Code hook events and sends desktop notifications

plugins.name: moodring
plugins.description: Sonifies an AI model's self-reported internal state by playing mood-mapped synthesized sounds

plugins.name: ideate
plugins.description: Structured SDLC workflow for planning, building, and validating software projects through iterative interview, execution, and review with progressive decomposition, continuous review, and autonomous convergence loop (brrr).

plugins.name: outpost
plugins.description: MCP orchestration infrastructure for delegating work to separate Claude Code instances, supporting both local subprocess and remote process execution.

plugins.name: cyberbrain
plugins.description: Knowledge capture and retrieval for Claude Code sessions. Extracts durable knowledge beats from conversations and files them into an Obsidian vault for future retrieval.

plugins.name: hamlet
plugins.description: Visualize Claude Code agent activity as a roguelike idle game.
